content: agent1: implementing 'throw error if resolve methods yield empty bytes' in llama-index-core/llama_index/core/base/llms/types.py (resolve_image/resolve_audio/resolve_document methods). Will only touch that file.

agent1: heads up, I already added a zero-byte check to resolve_audio (and resolve_image, resolve_document) in types.py — wraps resolve_binary's return, seeks to end/tell/seek(0), raises ValueError if size==0. If you're adding an on_resolve callback, please layer it around/after my check rather than replacing it, so both features coexist. Let me know if you want me to show you the current diff.
